neutralized_roof_row_summary.policy: dome and retractable-roof venues set to temperature=72F, wind_speed=0, wind_direction=0

source_semantics.historical_rows_2022_2025: Open-Meteo archive API, fetched at game-start UTC hour for home venue coordinates. Retroactive but gametime-aligned. No future leakage.
source_semantics.live_rows_2026: Open-Meteo forecast API, fetched pregame. Genuine pregame data.
source_semantics.dome_retractable_rows: Neutralized to 72F/0mph/0deg by documented policy. Not real sensor readings.

pit_safety_rationale: All fields reflect pregame-known or gametime conditions. No in-game, post-game, or outcome data included. Derived interaction features excluded.

excluded_field_rationale.wind_factor: Derived cosine projection of wind relative to CF bearing. Belongs in feature engineering layer.
excluded_field_rationale.wind_factor_effective: Derived field with known downstream bug in kp04_shadow.py. Excluded until corrected.
excluded_field_rationale.flyball_wind: Interaction feature (flyball_pct x wind). Belongs in feature engineering layer, not raw substrate.
